title: ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM - 211info
text: FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people donating furniture and appliances to those needing those items. Small items like blankets and hygiene items can be brought to the Family Resource Center. 3520 Frontage Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 271-9700 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 271-9700 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Call ahead before bringing a large quantity of items to make sure space is available. Larger items are not collected at the center but the center will connect the donor and family to make the exchange. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Gardiner, Reedsport, Scottsburg, and Winchester Bay Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Children's Clothing Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Furniture Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - JOB SEARCH INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER
